eyewear.description: A rare 1990s Japanese titanium frame, beautifully restored and fitted with premium ocean-blue CR39 lenses for unparalleled clarity.
Classic acetate and titanium combination frame. Hand-polished and upgraded with custom amber-tinted CR39 sun lenses.

cameras.description: Mint condition retro-styled DSLR featuring the D4 sensor. A mechanical joy combined with modern digital performance.
An incredibly rugged, full-frame DSLR beast. Only 1,000 units ever produced globally. Field-tested in the Dolomites.

journeys.title: Chasing Light in Hokkaido
journeys.description: Testing the low-light capabilities of the Nikon Df alongside wintery conditions and crisp vintage optics.
